title: Very cold weather with the possibility of snowfall
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service (Saws) has released its latest weather forecast for this coming week.

The weather service has warned that cold to very cold conditions are expected over the interior of the Eastern Cape province with snowfalls over north-eastern high-lying areas from Sunday into Monday.


> Here’s what you need to know.


A yellow level 1 warning has been issued for damaging winds and waves resulting in localised disruptions to roads, harbours and/or ports is expected between Plettenberg Bay and Port Edward in the morning.

There is also a yellow level 1 warning for winds and waves leading to difficulty in navigation at sea, expected between Alexander Bay and Cape Agulhas on Monday morning.


> Monday



> Tuesday



> Wednesday


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
